settings.title: Settings
settings.smartTimingDesc: Randomize intervals based on posting patterns
settings.desktopNotificationsDesc: Show notification when new messages arrive
settings.blogFullBackupOnDesc: Download all blog content and images for offline reading
settings.blogFullBackupOffDesc: Fetch blog content on-demand (saves disk space)

login.title: Account Management
login.subtitle: Connect your subscribed Sakamichi groups. You can connect multiple accounts simultaneously.
login.secureNote: Credentials are saved securely on your device via Windows Credential Manager.
